_comment: Keys starting with _ are stripped before the coverage check. Each top-level key must match VariantConfig.cell_key() EXACTLY: MODEL=<arch>,PREC=<precision>,RES=<input_size>,BS=<batch_size>. Values below are UNCALIBRATED placeholders -- enforce_thresholds is false in the config, so these are recorded, not asserted. Replace with measured baselines and flip enforce_thresholds to true to gate.
_gated_metrics: Only vision.throughput_img_s is gated today (see cvs/lib/vision/utils/vision_parsing.py GATED_METRICS). Every present cell must carry a spec for each gated metric before enforce_thresholds can be true.
